selected_sentences: This report examines how the magical institution of Hogwarts can become data driven.
First, this study explores core principles of data driven decision making, where we cover data literacy, culture, and governance.
Finally, we lay out a strategy for Hogwarts, outlining objectives, steps, challenges timeline, resource allocation, and success metrics.
The report demonstrates that becoming data driven requires technological solutions, strong governance and ethical responsibility.
Recently organizations have relied more on data to support their decision making.
In this report we focus on the concept of being a data driven business.
We apply this to a fictional case, based on Harry Potter, where the magical institution becomes data driven.
This fictional setting allowed us to make concepts that applied in a clear and accessible way while still addressing real-world problems.

We build on the findings the quality report presented us, and with these findings we made a strong strategy covering a clear vision, implementation steps, risk analysis, timelines, resource allocation, and metrics for success.
We highlighted that data driven transformation is not only technical but also organizational and ethical challenging.
This means that within the company everyone should be able to comprehend the data correctly.
Actionable insights are data findings that can be translated into actions or decisions.
summary_input: This report examines how the magical institution of Hogwarts can become data driven. First, this study explores core principles of data driven decision making, where we cover data literacy, culture, and governance. Finally, we lay out a strategy for Hogwarts, outlining objectives, steps, challenges timeline, resource allocation, and success metrics. The report demonstrates that becoming data driven requires technological solutions, strong governance and ethical responsibility. Recently organizations have relied more on data to support their decision making. In this report we focus on the concept of being a data driven business. We apply this to a fictional case, based on Harry Potter, where the magical institution becomes data driven. This fictional setting allowed us to make concepts that applied in a clear and accessible way while still addressing real-world problems. We build on the findings the quality report presented us, and with these findings we made a strong strategy covering a clear vision, implementation steps, risk analysis, timelines, resource allocation, and metrics for success. We highlighted that data driven transformation is not only technical but also organizational and ethical challenging. This means that within the company everyone should be able to comprehend the data correctly. Actionable insights are data findings that can be translated into actions or decisions.

metadata.title: DATA DRIVEN BUSINESS
metadata.description: This report examines how the magical institution of Hogwarts can become data driven. We combine theoretical and practical data analysis. First, this study explores core principles of data driven decision making, where we cover data literacy, culture, and governance. Then it analyzes the quality of a provided student dataset using data quality dimensions such as accuracy, completeness, consistency, and timeliness. Furthermore, we identify data quality issues, and the report discusses improvements and prevention methods, all of this to enhance data reliability. Finally, we lay out a strategy for Hogwarts, outlining objectives, steps, challenges timeline, resource allocation, and success metrics. The report demonstrates that becoming data driven requires technological solutions, strong governance and ethical responsibility.

front_lines_sample: HZ University of Applied Sciences Data Driven Business (CU75072V2)
This report examines how the magical institution of Hogwarts can become data driven.

We combine theoretical and practical data analysis. First, this study explores core principles of data driven decision making, where we cover data literacy, culture, and governance. Then it analyzes the quality of a provided student dataset using data quality dimensions such as accuracy, completeness, consistency, and timeliness. Furthermore, we identify data quality issues, and the report discusses improvements and prevention methods, all of this to enhance data reliability. Finally, we lay out a strategy for

Hogwarts, outlining objectives, steps, challenges timeline, resource allocation, and success metrics. The report demonstrates that becoming data driven requires technological solutions, strong governance and ethical responsibility.
